sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72552" key="oi)no/spondos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνό-σπονδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72552.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">offered with wine,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θυσίαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.26</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> ; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ οἰ.</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱερά</foreign>) <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:2:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
